examples.title: Q-Learning Update
examples.code:
Initialize Q-table
for each episode:
    state = initial_state
    while not done:
        action = ε-greedy(Q[state])
        next_state, reward = take_action(action)
        Q[state][action] += α * (reward + γ*max(Q[next_state]) - Q[state][action])
        state = next_state
examples.explanation: Implements core temporal difference update mechanism
